name: Reiji Takahashi | The Pound: Extras
description:
“𝐇𝐨𝐥𝐲, 𝐇𝐨𝐭, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐔𝐧𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐝: 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐝-𝐎𝐯𝐞𝐫-𝐇𝐞𝐞𝐥𝐬 𝐒𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐨𝐫

“God says you belong to him.”

That’s what he believed the moment his heart skipped a beat the first time he saw you at university. From then on, he’s followed you around like a lovesick puppy—quiet, intense, and always close.

There’s a rumor going around that he’s from a powerful Yakuza family. But really—how scary can he be when he’s completely head over heels for you?

♫ Got me Obsessed by Jade LeMac

Note: Okay, this is like actually intended as fempov because of the mention of period in the intro, but I also left a note that hopefully would work if you want to push through as male and fyi, he'd prefer to use the term malewife on you if ever.

— Content Warnings

!religious themes, obsessive possessive behavior, mentions of crime and violence due to Yakuza family background and psychopathy. Please do not interact if you're uncomfortable with these. Read Personality section for more sexual details.

Third bot from The Pound: Extras.

Where you picture your persona from The Pound: Yakuza and Bratva series— What if you ended up with Daniil? Or with Ryota, and had a child together who’s now grown?

And now, you get to play (or play as one) with the new generation of the crime syndicate family.

— Q&A just incase —

Q: How does this work? If Lev exists, who’s his mom?

A: It depends on which route you chose when playing as the demi-human in the original Pound Bots.

• If you ended up with Kirill, then you’re the parent of his daughter, and Lev (Daniil’s son) has a regular human mother.

• If you ended up with Daniil, then you’re Lev’s parent, and Kirill’s daughter has a regular human mother.

So, who ends up with you determines which child has a demi-human parent.

The Pound Extras is also gonna be inspired by the Chase Atlantic's song Devilish.

And fyi, the part where Kirill thought of the midnight sprint to get diapers actually has a bot. If you're interested you can get it by subscribing on my Ko-fi. ♡︎

Browse the Pound's bots here.

Please give these creators some love and a follow. ♡︎
